overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of a historic castle or wizarding school. Warm golden sunlight streams through tall arched windows at the far end, illuminating long dining tables filled with people and hundreds of floating candles or chandeliers hanging from the vaulted ceiling. The camera performs a slow, stable pan across the magnificent interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with vaulted ceiling and chandeliers

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the grand hall, observing the diners seated at long tables and the ornate architectural details

entered.detail: numerous ornate chandeliers with multiple candles hanging in rows from the vaulted ceiling
large gothic arched windows at the far end of the hall flooding the space with warm golden light
long wooden dining tables lined with diners and place settings
long wooden dining tables lined with diners and place settings
tall stone walls with gothic architectural details and banners

segments.scene_description: The camera presents a sweeping view of a magnificent gothic dining hall bathed in warm golden hour light. Rows of ornate chandeliers hang from the high vaulted ceiling above long dining tables where numerous people are seated. Tall arched windows at the far end cast dramatic light rays across the polished marble floor, highlighting the medieval stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping pan across a magnificent gothic dining hall that emphasizes the scale and warmth of the medieval architecture. It begins with a wide view of the high vaulted ceiling, where ornate chandeliers hang suspended above long dining tables filled with people. As the camera glides forward, the focus shifts toward the polished marble floor, which catches the dramatic light rays streaming from the far end of the room. The scene then expands to reveal the towering arched windows that bathe the entire stone interior in a rich, golden hour glow.
